topic: simple interest, loan comparison, monthly payments
latex:
A loan could have been taken out for the classes in Exercise 13.

\textbf{a.} The simple interest rate is $5\%$ and the time for the loan is 2 years. What would have been the total amount paid for the $\$3{,}000$ classes?

\textbf{b.} What is the monthly payment when each payment is the same amount?

\textbf{c.} Which option costs less, the credit card or the loan?
